title: Ship v9.1 Product Value Comprehension Gate
description: Make AOF releases capability-first: add product value evidence, capability matrix, before/after product benchmark, Mission Control understanding projection, and release-state gate so user value comprehension is treated as a governed outcome rather than an after-the-fact summary.
triage_notes: v9.1 Product Value Comprehension Gate implemented with product value evidence record/audit, Mission Control projection, release-state gate, docs, and runtime proof artifacts.
